business.name: Hubbs Septic Services
business.tagline: When it needs to go, we make it flow

hero.headline: Syracuse's septic team that *shows up on time*
hero.subheadline: Dennis cleans up the mess — both your tank and the job site.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: From pumping to pipes — we handle it all
services_section.subheading: Professional septic services that keep your system running smooth

services.title: Septic Tank Pumping
services.description: Complete tank cleaning and waste removal. We show up when scheduled and clean up when done.

services.title: D-Box & Pipe Repair
services.description: Replace distribution boxes, outlet baffles, and damaged pipes. Fair pricing, quality parts.

services.title: System Installation
services.description: New septic system installation with proper permits and inspections.

services.title: Emergency Service
services.description: When your system backs up, we respond fast to get things flowing again.

about.heading: Dennis Hubbs — Syracuse Septic Pro
about.body: One truck, one owner, honest work. Dennis treats your property like his own and delivers fair pricing every time.

reviews.name: mary b.
reviews.text: Dennis shows when he says he will and does a great job cleaning out the tank. Very reasonable price and professional.

reviews.name: David C.
reviews.text: Replaced D-box and pipes. Very polite, on time, cleaned up the job site, and pricing was very reasonable. Would recommend.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Syracuse and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional septic services throughout Central New York

cta.heading: Ready to get your septic system serviced?
cta.body: Call Dennis for honest pricing and professional service. Same-day quotes available.
